tools.name: HuggingFace TRL (Transformer Reinforcement Learning)
tools.description: Full-stack library for training transformer LMs with RL methods. Includes RewardTrainer, PPOTrainer, GRPOTrainer, DPOTrainer, SFTTrainer. Supports ORM training natively. Built on HF Transformers/Accelerate/PEFT ecosystem.
tools.reward_model_support: RewardTrainer for ORM; no native PRM trainer yet
tools.scale: Single GPU to multi-node via DeepSpeed/Accelerate

tools.name: OpenRLHF
tools.description: High-performance RLHF framework built on Ray + vLLM + DeepSpeed. Supports PPO, REINFORCE++, GRPO, RLOO, DAPO. Used by Google, ByteDance, Alibaba. Supports 70B+ model training with distributed scheduling.
tools.reward_model_support: Multiple reward models, remote reward model API, custom reward functions

tools.name: veRL (Volcano Engine RL)
tools.description: Flexible, efficient RL training framework for LLM post-training. Supports PPO, GRPO, GSPO, ReMax, REINFORCE++, RLOO, PRIME, DAPO. Integrates vLLM/SGLang for rollouts. FSDP2 backend.
tools.reward_model_support: Model-based reward and function-based (verifiable) reward for math/code
tools.scale: Multi-node, achieved O1-level performance on AIME

tools.name: DeepSpeed-Chat
tools.description: Microsoft's RLHF training system. 3-step pipeline: SFT, Reward Model training, RLHF/PPO. DeepSpeed Hybrid Engine for up to 15x speedup. Supports 350M to 175B parameters.
tools.reward_model_support: Dedicated Step 2 for reward model finetuning with comparison datasets

tools.name: NVIDIA NeMo Aligner
tools.description: Scalable toolkit for model alignment. Supports SteerLM, DPO, RLHF/PPO. Built on Megatron-LM with 3D parallelism. TensorRT-LLM integration for inference acceleration.
tools.reward_model_support: SupervisedTrainer for reward modeling, CriticServerTrainer for RL critic

tools.name: RLHFlow RLHF-Reward-Modeling
tools.description: Collection of recipes for training reward/preference models. Top-3 8B reward models on RewardBench trained with this repo. Supports Bradley-Terry RM, Pairwise Preference Model, SSRM, Math-RM (PRM+ORM), Decision-tree RM.
tools.reward_model_support: Bradley-Terry RM, Pairwise PM, Math-RM (PRM+ORM), Decision-tree RM

tools.name: Axolotl
tools.description: Fine-tuning framework that added PRM training support. Trains on stepwise-supervision datasets where each reasoning step is labeled for correctness.
tools.reward_model_support: PRM fine-tuning with stepwise supervision datasets

tools.name: OpenR (OpenReasoner)
tools.description: Infrastructure for integrating PRMs into offline and online RL pipelines. Provides recipes for PRM-guided training across reasoning benchmarks. Uses PRM800K, Math-Shepherd, MATH-APS datasets.
tools.reward_model_support: PRM training via supervised fine-tuning, offline and online RL integration

tools.name: PRIME (Process Reinforcement through Implicit Rewards)
tools.description: Open-source solution for online RL with process rewards. Advances reasoning abilities beyond imitation/distillation. Implicit process reward computation.
tools.reward_model_support: Implicit process rewards for online RL

tools.name: PRM Library (sdiehl/prm)
tools.description: Dedicated library for process reward modeling. Built on HuggingFace Trainer. Includes tree search inference. ProcessRewardTrainer wrapper class.
tools.reward_model_support: Dedicated PRM training and tree search inference

tools.name: LMFlow
tools.description: Framework for reward model training following InstructGPT procedure. Includes RAFT (Reward rAnked FineTuning) alignment algorithm.
tools.reward_model_support: InstructGPT-style reward model training, RAFT alignment

tools.name: Unsloth
tools.description: Fast fine-tuning framework supporting SFT, DPO, and GRPO for RL training. Popular for SLM reasoning training with Qwen/Phi models.

tools.name: Swift (ModelScope)
tools.description: Alibaba's training framework supporting SFT, DPO, GRPO for Qwen models. Integrated best practices for reasoning training.
tools.reward_model_support: GRPO, DPO, rule-based and model-based rewards

tools.name: Llama-Factory
tools.description: Unified fine-tuning framework supporting 100+ LLMs. Includes SFT, DPO, GRPO, reward model training.

tools.name: Argilla
tools.description: Data labeling and curation platform for RLHF. Supports preference data collection, reward model training data preparation.
tools.reward_model_support: Preference data annotation for reward model training

tools.name: Label Studio
tools.description: Open source data labeling platform with RLVR support. Guides for reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards.

research_methods.name: GenRM (Generative Reward Model / Generative Verifier)
research_methods.description: Trains verifiers using next-token prediction. LLM answers 'Is the answer correct (Yes/No)?' via SFT. GenRM-CoT adds chain-of-thought before verification. Published at ICLR 2025 by Google DeepMind.
research_methods.innovation: Replaces discriminative classification with generative verification

research_methods.name: R-PRM (Reasoning-Driven PRM)
research_methods.description: Enhances step-by-step evaluation via supervised cold-start, meta-optimization, and inference-time scaling.

research_methods.name: OpenPRM
research_methods.description: Integrates ORMs and PRMs under same pairwise ranking objectives. Scalable process-level supervision in open domains.

research_methods.name: AURORA
research_methods.description: Automated framework for training universal PRMs using ensemble prompting and reverse verification. Includes UniversalBench.
research_methods.innovation: Automated PRM annotation without human labels

research_methods.name: LLaMA-Berry (MCTS + PPRM)
research_methods.description: Combines Monte Carlo Tree Search with Pairwise Preference Reward Model (PPRM) for math reasoning with small models.
research_methods.innovation: MCTS + pairwise verifier for solution search

research_methods.name: K2V (Knowledge-to-Verification)
research_methods.description: Extends RLVR to knowledge-intensive domains beyond math/code. Enables verification of reasoning without human supervision.

research_methods.name: HERMES
research_methods.description: Multi-modular agent that integrates formal verification into LLM reasoning using tool-calling for step verification.

key_datasets.name: PRM800K
key_datasets.description: 800K step-level labels for math reasoning process supervision

key_datasets.name: Math-Shepherd
key_datasets.description: Automatically generated process-wise supervision data for math

key_datasets.name: UltraFeedback
key_datasets.description: Large-scale preference dataset for reward model training

key_datasets.name: HH-RLHF
key_datasets.description: Human preference data for helpfulness and harmlessness
